basic_details.job_title: ECHS Faridkot – Pharmacist, Lab Technician and More – 05 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Cell Station HQ Faridkot, under the Government of India Ministry of Defence, will recruit 5 posts on contractual basis for ECHS Polyclinic Faridkot. Interested candidates can apply as per the format available on the ECHS website before 06 June 2026. Check details like eligibility, salary, vacancy & more from the article.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Pharma, MBBS, Diploma, MS/MD, D.Pharm, DMLT

how_to_apply: Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to apply for the ECHS Polyclinic Faridkot Recruitment 2026 posts. Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application.
seo_tags: ECHS Polyclinic Faridkot Recruitment 2026 Notification Out For 5 Posts, Apply Before 06 June 2026
